program: Prime Ascent Plus - Standard Doc and Alt Doc

general.io_term: 30-year total loan term, qualification based upon remaining term (amortized) after expiration of IO period
general.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years, or 6 months interest on prepayments exceeding 20% of original balance in 12-month period. Investment property only.
general.cash_in_hand_note: Not applicable to Delayed Financing transactions
general.escrows: HPML loans require escrows for property taxes, hazard insurance, and flood insurance
general.appraisals: FNMA Form 1004, 1073 with interior/exterior inspection. Appraisal review product required unless 2nd appraisal obtained. 2nd Appraisal required for loans > $2,000,000.

full_doc_methods: Wage/Salary: Paystubs, W-2s, 1 or 2 years Tax Returns, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
Self-Employed: 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C
alt_doc_methods: Personal Bank Statements (12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business)
Business Bank Statements (12 or 24 months) with Fixed Expense Ratio 50%, or 3rd party expense ratio min 10%, or 3rd party P&L

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower with highest qualifying income; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived if primary borrower has 3 credit scores.
underwriting.assets: Min 30-day asset verification required; large deposits must be sourced

ineligible: Investor occupancy in Baltimore City MD

declining_market: Max LTV/CLTV limited to 85% purchase, 75% rate/term and cash-out

program: Prime Ascent - Standard Doc and Alt Doc

general.max_dti_over_50_note: Up to 55% allowed with min residual income $3,500, max LTV/CLTV <= 80%, Standard Doc 2-years, min 6 months reserves, not FTHB, min credit score 660
general.io_terms: 30 and 40-year total loan terms, qualification based upon remaining term (amortized) after expiration of IO period
general.arm_40_year_note: ARM 40-year term must be combined with interest only feature
general.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years, or 6 months interest on prepayments exceeding 20% of original balance in 12-month period. Investment property only.
general.escrows: HPML loans require escrows for property taxes, hazard insurance, and flood insurance. See waiver options in Section 2.5.5 for non-HPML and Business Purpose loans.
general.appraisals: FNMA Form 1004, 1025, 1073 with interior/exterior inspection. Appraisal review product required unless 2nd appraisal obtained. 2nd Appraisal required for loans > $2,000,000.

full_doc_methods: Standard Doc: Wage/Salary - Paystubs, W-2s, 1 or 2 years Tax Returns, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
Standard Doc: Self-Employed - 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C
AUS Findings: DU Approve/Eligible or LPA Accept/Eligible permitted for income documentation relief
alt_doc_methods: Personal Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business
Business Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months with Fixed Expense Ratio 50%, or 3rd party expense ratio min 10%, or 3rd party P&L
P&L Statement Only: 12 or 24 months CPA/EA/CTEC/Tax Attorney prepared (max 1x30x12 housing, min 36 mo credit event seasoning)
P&L Statement with 2 Mo Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months P&L + 2 months business bank statements (max 1x30x12 housing, min 36 mo credit event seasoning)
Written VOE: FNMA Form 1005 + 2 months personal bank statements (max 1x30x12 housing, min 36 mo credit event seasoning)
IRS Form 1099: 1 or 2 years 1099, Fixed Expense Ratio 10%, YTD documentation
Asset Utilization: Eligible assets divided by 84 for monthly income (max 1x30x12 housing, min 36 mo credit event seasoning)

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower with highest qualifying income; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived if primary borrower has 3 credit scores.
underwriting.assets: Min 30-day asset verification required; large deposits must be sourced

gift_funds.100_pct_gift_note: 100% gift allowed for Standard Doc 12/24 months and Alt Doc Bank Statement 12/24 months with max 80% LTV/CLTV

declining_market: Max LTV/CLTV limited to 85% purchase, 80% refinance, max loan amount $2.0MM

program: ITIN - Standard Doc and Alt Doc

general.io_term: 30-year total loan term, qualification based upon remaining term (amortized) after expiration of IO period
general.appraisals: FNMA Form 1004, 1025, 1073 with interior/exterior inspection. Appraisal review product required.

full_doc_methods: Wage/Salary: Paystubs, W-2s, 1 or 2 years Tax Returns, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
Self-Employed: 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, 2 monthly bank statements, IRS Form 4506-C
alt_doc_methods: Personal Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business
Business Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months with Fixed Expense Ratio 50%, or 3rd party expense ratio min 10%, or 3rd party P&L
IRS Form 1099: 1 or 2 years, Fixed Expense Ratio 10%, YTD documentation
Written VOE: FNMA Form 1005 + 2 months personal bank statements (min credit score 680)

documentation_requirements: Copy of unexpired government-issued ID (passport, Matricula Consular, US State-issued ID)
Copy of ITIN card or letter from IRS assigning ITIN number
ITIN must be assigned prior to application
IRS Form W7 not acceptable if ITIN letter not provided or not legible
underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower with highest qualifying income; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity, or 1 mortgage/installment/revolving reporting 36 months with activity in last 6 months. Waived if primary borrower has 3 credit scores. Non-traditional credit not eligible.
underwriting.assets: Min 30-day asset verification required; large deposits must be sourced
underwriting.escrows: HPML loans require escrows for property taxes, hazard insurance, and flood insurance

declining_market: Maximum eligible LTVs do not require a market adjustment for the ITIN program

general.min_loan_note: Loan Amt < $150K: Max LTV/CLTV Purchase 70%, any Refinance 65% (Min DSCR 1.25)
property_types: Condo Hotel/Condotel (Max LTV/CLTV Purchase 75%, Refinance 65%, Max Loan $1,500,000)
general.io_terms: 30 and 40-year total terms, qualification based upon the interest only payment
general.arm_40_year_note: ARM 40-year must be combined with interest only feature
general.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years, or 6 months interest on prepayments exceeding 20% of original balance in 12-month period.
general.cash_in_hand_note: Total equity withdrawn cannot exceed limits. Not applicable to Delayed Financing transactions.
general.appraisals: FNMA Form 1004, 1025, 1073 with interior/exterior inspection. Appraisal review product required unless 2nd appraisal obtained. 2nd Appraisal required for loans > $2,000,000.

income_doc.dscr_calc: Monthly Gross Rents / PITIA (or ITIA) of subject property
income_doc.dscr_min: No minimum stated (sub-1.00 allowed per grid)

long_term_rental_purchase.rents_source: FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 reflecting long-term market rents
long_term_rental_purchase.tenant_occupied_rule: If currently tenant occupied, 1007/1025 must reflect current monthly rent evaluated per unit
long_term_rental_purchase.actual_vs_market_rent: Use lower of actual lease or estimated market rent. Higher actual requires 2 months receipt evidence and must be within 120% of market. Higher market must be within 120% of lease. Capped at 120% if exceeded.

required_docs: FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 with long-term market rents
long_term_rental_refinance.no_lease_ltv_cap: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix
long_term_rental_refinance.vacant_refinance_ltv: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix

str.definition: Properties leased on a nightly, weekly, monthly, or seasonal basis (e.g., Airbnb, VRBO, FlipKey)
str.ltv_note: LTV is lesser of 75% purchase / 70% refinance, or LTV per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance (excludes condotels)
str.expense_factor: 20% minimum (if actual expenses > 20%, use actual expenses)
str.dscr_calc_str: PITIA: (Gross Rents * 0.80) / PITIA = DSCR; ITIA: (Gross Rents * 0.80) / ITIA = DSCR
str.multiple_sources_rule: Use lowest source of monthly income
proof_requirements: STR analysis form or 1007/1025 by licensed appraiser (with comparable STRs, daily rate, occupancy %, seasonality, data source)
Most recent 12-month rental history from 3rd party rental/management service (net of vendor fees)
Most recent 12-month bank statements from borrower evidencing STR deposits with rental records
AirDNA Rentalizer/Property Earning Potential Report (Purchase ONLY, 12-month forecast within 90 days of Note date, 3 comparable properties, Market/Sub-Market Score >= 60)

airdna_details.forecast_period: 12 months, dated within 90 days of Note date
airdna_details.income_calc: Revenue projection less 20% extraordinary expense factor

housing_history.0x60x12: Max 70% LTV Purchase, Max 65% LTV Rate/Term & Cash-Out

bk_fc_ss_dil_prefc_mc.gte_24_months: Max 75% LTV Purchase, Max 70% LTV Rate/Term & Cash-Out

investor_experience.experienced_investor: Must have history of owning/managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential RE for at least 1 year in last 3 years

restrictions: >= 36 Mo seasoning from any credit event

investor_experience.first_time_homebuyer: Not eligible except as allowed in Seller Guide

long_term_rental_vacant_refinance: LTV is lesser of 70% or per DSCR/Credit Score/Loan Balance table
str_all_transactions: LTV is lesser of 75% purchase, 70% refinance, or per DSCR/Credit Score/Loan Balance table
declining_market: Max LTV/CLTV limited to 75% purchase, 70% refinance, max loan amount $2.0MM

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived if borrower/guarantor has 3 credit scores.

program: Investor Solutions - DSCR (5-8 Unit Residential / 2-8 Mixed Use)

property_types: Mixed Use 2-8 Unit (Commercial limited to Retail/Office/Restaurant)
general.io_term: 30-year term, qualification based upon the interest only payment

appraisals.5_8_residential: FHLMC 71A, 71B, FNMA 1050 or similar short form, or narrative report
appraisals.2_8_mixed_use: General Purpose Commercial Forms or narrative report
appraisals.review_product: Commercial sales and income BPO or second appraisal (PA and NC use commercial evaluation product)

income_doc.dscr_calc: Eligible monthly rents / PITIA (or ITIA for IO loans)
income_doc.leased_units: Use lower of estimated market rent or lease agreement
income_doc.vacant_unit_limits: Max 1 vacant on 2-3 Unit, 2 vacancies on 4+ Units
income_doc.management_fee: Reduce qualifying rents by any management fee on appraisal report
income_doc.mixed_use_income_cap: Income from commercial space must not exceed 49.99% of total property income

investor_experience.experienced_investor: Must have history of owning/managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential RE for at least 1 year in last 3 years

declining_market: Maximum eligible LTVs do not require a market adjustment for 5-8 multifamily and 2-8 mixed use

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived individually for each borrower/guarantor with 3 credit scores.
underwriting.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years.

property_types: 2-4 Unit (Max LTV/CLTV Purchase 75%, Refinance 70% - overlay applies if any property in portfolio)
Condo Hotel/Condotel (Max LTV/CLTV Purchase 75%, Refinance 65%, Max Loan $1,500,000)
general.rural_note: Overlay applies if any property in portfolio is rural
general.io_qualification: Based upon the interest only payment
general.mixed_transactions_note: Eligibility/pricing based on most conservative transaction type
general.partial_release: 120% of allocated balance required to be paid
general.escrows: Required for cross-collateral, may not be waived
general.appraisals: FNMA Form 1004, 1025, 1073 with interior/exterior inspection. Appraisal review product required unless 2nd appraisal obtained. 2nd Appraisal required for loans > $2,000,000.

vacant_property.ltv_reduction: 10% LTV reduction when 25% or more properties in portfolio are vacant
vacant_property.2_4_unit_vacancy_def: Property considered vacant when 2+ units vacant. Use 75% market rent for vacant units.

income_doc.loan_dscr_calc: Total gross rental income for all properties / Total loan amount PITIA (or ITIA)
income_doc.property_dscr_calc: Gross rental income per property / Allocated loan amount PITIA (or ITIA) per property

investor_experience.experienced_investor: Must have history of owning/managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential RE for at least 1 year in last 3 years

state_overlays.note: Overlay applies if any property in portfolio is in these states

declining_market: Max LTV/CLTV limited to 75% purchase, 70% refinance. Overlay applies if any property in portfolio is in declining market.

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived individually for each borrower/guarantor with 3 credit scores.
underwriting.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years.

general.io_terms: 30 and 40-year total loan terms, qualification based upon the interest only payment
general.arm_40_year_note: ARM 40-year term must be combined with interest only feature

general.cash_in_hand_note: Total equity withdrawn cannot exceed limits

Conveyances to Foreign Entities By Entity Buyer

income_doc.dscr_calc: Monthly Gross Rents / PITIA (or ITIA) of subject property
income_doc.short_term_rental: Same as DSCR 1-4 Unit program with same documentation methods

str.refinance_only_ltv: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance table
str.dscr_calc_str: PITIA: (Gross Rents * 0.80) / PITIA; ITIA: (Gross Rents * 0.80) / ITIA
proof_requirements: STR analysis form or 1007/1025 by licensed appraiser
Most recent 12-month rental history from 3rd party rental/management service
Most recent 12-month bank statements from borrower evidencing STR deposits
AirDNA Rentalizer (Purchase ONLY, 12-month forecast within 90 days Note date, 3 comparables, Market/Sub-Market Score >= 60)

long_term_rental_vacant_refinance: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/Credit Score/Loan Balance table
str_refinance_only: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/Credit Score/Loan Balance table
declining_market: Max LTV/CLTV limited to 70% refinance, max loan amount $2.0MM all transactions

underwriting.credit_score_method: If score available, use representative score of borrower/guarantor with highest representative score; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Not required. If borrower has U.S. credit score see section 2.5.12 of Non-Agency Seller Guide.

program: Closed End Second - Standard and Alt Doc

general.io_qualification: Based upon remaining term (amortized) after expiration of IO period
general.balloon_note: 30/15 Balloon: 30-year fully amortized term with 15-year balloon. Qualifying based on 180 months.
general.prepay_options: Up to 5-year; Fixed percentage >= 3%, declining structures not exceeding 5% and not below 3% in first 3 years, or 6 months interest on prepayments exceeding 20% of original balance. Investment property only.
loan_purpose: Simultaneous Purchase (first lien must be Agency-eligible)
general.escrows: Not permitted for second lien programs
ineligible_loan_features: Unseasoned cash-out (existing lien is cash-out within 6 months note-to-note)
Frequent Refinances (2+ cash-out refinances in past 12 months)
general.listing_seasoning: Properties listed for sale within past 6 months not eligible

full_doc_methods: Wage/Salary: Paystubs, 1 or 2 years W-2s, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
Self-Employed: 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C
alt_doc_methods: Personal Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business
Business Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months with Fixed Expense Ratio 50%, or 3rd party expense ratio min 10%, or 3rd party P&L
P&L Statement with 2 Mo Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months, max CLTV 80%
Written VOE: FNMA Form 1005 + 2 months personal bank statements, max CLTV 80%
IRS Form 1099: 1 or 2 years, Fixed Expense Ratio 10%, YTD documentation
DU/LPA: For simultaneous purchase only, Approve/Eligible or Accept/Eligible required

documentation_required: Copy of 1st lien Note (default interest rate cannot exceed Note rate)
Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement
first_lien_eligibility.qualifying_payment_standalone: Use mortgage payment verified on credit report

qualifying_payment_simultaneous.fixed_rate: Note rate amortized over total loan term
qualifying_payment_simultaneous.arm: Higher of fully indexed rate or Note rate
qualifying_payment_simultaneous.io: Amortized over remaining term after IO expiration

ineligible_first_liens: Forbearance/modifications/deferrals within 12 months of Note date
Balloon if due during 2nd lien amortization

declining_market: Max CLTV limited to 80% for all transactions

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative score of borrower with highest qualifying income; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores
underwriting.tradelines: Min 2 reporting 24 months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12 months with recent activity. Waived if primary borrower has 3 credit scores.
underwriting.assets: Min 30-day asset verification if funds needed to consummate transaction
underwriting.gift_funds: Simultaneous Purchase: Follow first lien requirements

program: Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) - Standard and Alt Doc

product_terms.draw_payment: Interest only, greater of accrued interest or $100
product_terms.repayment_payment: Amortizing P&I based on max line amount, repayment term, current rate
product_terms.qualifying_payment: Amortizing P&I based on max line amount, repayment term, current rate (Index + Margin)

ineligible_loan_features: Unseasoned cash-out (existing lien is cash-out within 6 months note-to-note)
Frequent Refinances (2+ cash-out refinances in past 12 months)
general.listing_seasoning: Properties listed for sale within past 6 months not eligible
general.solar_panels: UCC filings associated with subject property are ineligible
general.escrows: Not permitted for second lien programs

full_doc_methods: Wage/Salary: Paystubs, W-2s, 1 or 2 years Tax Returns, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
Self-Employed: 1 or 2 years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C
alt_doc_methods: Personal Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business
Business Bank Statements: 12 or 24 months with Fixed Expense Ratio 50%

documentation_required: Copy of 1st lien Note (default interest rate cannot exceed Note rate)
Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement

qualifying_payment.fixed_rate: Note rate amortized over total loan term
qualifying_payment.arm: Higher of fully indexed rate or Note rate
qualifying_payment.io: Amortized over remaining term after IO expiration

ineligible_first_liens: Forbearance/modifications/deferrals within 12 months of Note date
Balloon if due during 2nd lien amortization

declining_market: Max HCLTV limited to 80% for all transactions

underwriting.credit_score_method: Use lowest representative score amongst all borrowers; lower of 2 or middle of 3 scores. Rapid rescoring not allowed.
underwriting.tradelines: All borrowers must have 3 reporting with 1 currently open and active for at least 24 months. Other 2 reported for 12 months can be open or closed.
underwriting.document_age_property: Title Report (or O&E) 60 days, Appraisal 120 days, AVM 90 days

appraisals.primary_valuation_gt_400k: Full appraisal with interior inspection required
